themes.name: Breath Practices
themes.description: Contemplations focusing on the in-breath (prāṇa), out-breath (apāna), and the pause/gap between them (madhya, visarga).

themes.name: Void / Śūnya Practices
themes.description: Absorption of mind into space, emptiness, and the formless void of consciousness.

themes.name: Sound / Mantra Practices
themes.description: Absorption through chanting, internal resonance (nāda), and concentration on seed syllables.

themes.name: Sensory Absorption
themes.description: Directing awareness through the gateways of the senses (sight, sound, taste, touch) to resolve into their source.

themes.name: Body & Space Practices
themes.description: Contemplating the body as empty space, or focusing on specific internal channels (suṣumṇā) and centers.

themes.name: Sleep & Dream Practices
themes.description: Transforming the states of deep sleep, dreaming, and the transitions between waking and sleeping into nondual presence.

themes.name: Light & Darkness
themes.description: Gazing into brilliant light or absolute darkness to dissolve the subject-object boundary.

themes.name: Emotion & Intensity
themes.description: Using intense states of mind (joy, desire, anger, pain, or fear) as high-energy gateways to nondual awareness.

themes.name: Nondual Recognition
themes.description: Direct, sudden recognition of the self as the all-pervading consciousness, without reliance on a specific technique.
